overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA: Vice City Definitive Edition showing protagonist Tommy Vercetti moving along Ocean Beach. The character transitions from walking to running across the sandy beach, passing sunbathers and pedestrians with the Vice City skyline visible initially before moving toward the open beach area.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal beach with urban hotel skyline

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy beach with the Vice City skyline visible on the left side

notable_agents.action: beachgoer lying on a towel sunbathing on the sand

entered.detail: tall modern hotel and apartment buildings with glass facades lining the beachfront
expansive sandy beach terrain stretching toward the water
calm blue ocean water visible at the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Tommy Vercetti walking along Ocean Beach in Vice City. The camera follows from behind as he moves across the sandy terrain with tall beachfront hotels visible on the left. A few scattered beachgoers are seen sunbathing and walking in the distance under a bright sunny sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach area with active pedestrians

events.description: character transitions from walking to running and continues along the beach toward the water

agents.ego_description: running along the beach passing various groups of pedestrians and beachgoers

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs running along the beach in swimwear
beachgoers walking and standing on the sand

segments.scene_description: The character breaks into a run along the beach, moving away from the city buildings toward the open shoreline. Various NPCs are encountered, including groups running and walking along the sand. The urban skyline gradually moves out of view as the camera focuses on the beach activity and ocean.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny coastline that transitions from an urban beachfront into an open sandy expanse. It begins with Tommy Vercetti walking across the sand, with the camera trailing behind him as tall beachfront hotels line the left side of the frame. As he breaks into a run, the camera accelerates away from the city buildings and toward the shoreline, passing scattered sunbathers and pedestrians. The scene then shifts as the urban skyline gradually recedes from view, focusing instead on the activity of various NPCs running and walking along the beach. Finally, the environment opens up completely, leaving the city behind in favor of the wide shoreline and the ocean.
